creator: yom@iaelu.net
text:
(In reply to Matthias Fechner from comment #6)
when trying to remove lang/ruby32, the package command shows that rubygem-18n is locked.

```
root@gl:~ # pkg delete lang/ruby32
pkg: rubygem-i18n is locked cannot delete ruby
Cannot perform request
root@gl:~ # pkg unlock rubygem-i18n
rubygem-i18n-1.12.0,2: unlock this package? [y/N]: y
Unlocking rubygem-i18n-1.12.0,2
root@gl:~ # pkg delete lang/ruby32
Checking integrity... done (0 conflicting)
Deinstallation has been requested for the following 4 packages (of 0 packages in the universe):

Installed packages to be REMOVED:
        ruby: 3.2.3,1
        ruby32-gems: 3.4.20
        rubygem-concurrent-ruby: 1.2.3
        rubygem-i18n: 1.12.0,2

Number of packages to be removed: 4

The operation will free 46 MiB.

Proceed with deinstalling packages? [y/N]: y
[gl] [1/4] Deinstalling rubygem-i18n-1.12.0,2...
[gl] [1/4] Deleting files for rubygem-i18n-1.12.0,2: 100%
[gl] [2/4] Deinstalling rubygem-concurrent-ruby-1.2.3...
[gl] [2/4] Deleting files for rubygem-concurrent-ruby-1.2.3: 100%
[gl] [3/4] Deinstalling ruby32-gems-3.4.20...
[gl] [3/4] Deleting files for ruby32-gems-3.4.20: 100%
[gl] [4/4] Deinstalling ruby-3.2.3,1...
[gl] [4/4] Deleting files for ruby-3.2.3,1: 100%
```

I'm now trying to reinstall www/gitlab-ce.
